ticket.subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.raw_subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.description:
Hello Drew,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from eb1ii0-fe.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello William,

Thank you for your reply.

If you would prefer not to display the calculated rates, you can disable the Rate Automation rule by navigating to **App → Settings → Shipping Rates → Rate Automation**. This will allow you to continue the setup without displaying calculated rates.

Additionally, we have enhanced the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app to display both **FedEx One Rate** and **FedEx Ground services** together, so using two separate apps is no longer required.

We can also discuss this further on a scheduled call if that works for you. We will share the meeting link 5–10 minutes prior to the scheduled time.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello William,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
If you would prefer not to display the calculated rates, you can disable the Rate Automation rule by navigating to App → Settings → Shipping Rates → Rate Automation. This will allow you to continue the setup without displaying calculated rates.
 
Additionally, we have enhanced the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app to display both FedEx One Rate and FedEx Ground services together, so using two separate apps is no longer required.
 
We can also discuss this further on a scheduled call if that works for you. We will share the meeting link 5–10 minutes prior to the scheduled time.
 
Looking forward to speaking with you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
